Automatic Rolex Calibre 3235 movement provides precise timekeeping and power reserve

Screw-down Oyster clasp offers secure and easy fastening

media.alt_text: 2022 Rolex Datejust 36 Oystersteel Green Dial (126200)

description.plain: This timepiece is in new condition, with no signs of wear. It has been resized but includes the removed links. It comes as part of a set that includes boxes, hangtags (white and green), a bezel protector, case back factory stickers, and papers dated September 28th, 2022. The Rolex Datejust collection was first introduced in 1945 and was the first wristwatch to feature a date display on the dial. It has since become an iconic timepiece known for its timeless design and innovative features. The Rolex Datejust 36 is the ideal blend of style and functionality. This timepiece is a masterpiece of horology, boasting a 36mm diameter case and a bezel crafted from Oystersteel. A high-grade stainless steel alloy developed by Rolex which is known for its exceptional durability and resistance to corrosion. The highlight of this watch is its stunning green dial, which adds a touch of elegance and uniqueness to its overall aesthetic. One of the key functionalities is its date display, which is located at the three o'clock position on the dial. With a water resistance of up to 100 meters, it is suitable for water-related activities. This timepiece features a sturdy Oyster bracelet with a folding Oysterclasp and the Easylink 5mm comfort extension system, allowing for easy adjustments for a perfect fit on the wrist. Powering this exceptional timepiece is the Rolex automatic movement caliber 3235, which boasts impressive accuracy, reliability, and performance. With a power reserve of up to 70 hours, it can be worn for multiple days without needing to be wound, providing added convenience and functionality. It also features a solid back case, which provides protection the movement and adds to the watch's durability. With its impressive features and elegant design, the Rolex Datejust 36 with a green dial surely will turn heads wherever you go. Don't miss out on the opportunity to own this exceptional timepiece. Place your bid now and elevate your style with this iconic Rolex watch. This timepiece is in new condition, with no signs of wear. It has been resized but includes the removed links. It comes as part of a set that includes boxes, hangtags (white and green), a bezel protector, case back factory stickers, and papers dated September 28th, 2022.

description.plain: A Swiss-made luxury watch featuring an olive green dial, automatic Caliber 3235 movement, and robust stainless steel construction.

metadata.top_features:
Olive green dial with Roman numeral hour markers enhances visual appeal and readability
Cyclops lens over date window allows for easy and precise date viewing
Instantaneous date setting enables quick adjustments without a crown
Self-winding automatic Caliber 3235 movement ensures reliable, hands-free operation
70-hour power reserve provides extended wear between windings

Bracelet Material: 18K yellow gold Jubilee bracelet

Power Reserve: 70 hours
Movement: Automatic Caliber 3235, 28,800 VPH
Certification: COSC Superlative Chronometer

media.alt_text: Rolex Datejust 36 Olive Green Dial Watch 126203-0025

variants.title: Rolex Datejust 36 Olive Green Dial Watch 126203-0025

description.plain: Model # 126203 | M126203-0025 NEW ROLEX DATEJUST 36 MEN'S OR WOMEN'S LUXURY WATCH FOR SALE With Manufacturer Serial Numbers Swiss Made Olive Green Dial Roman Numeral Hour Markers Diamond Roman VI & IX Polished Solid 18k Yellow Gold Domed Bezel Date Feature Date Window Displayed at 3 O'Clock Cyclops Lens Over Date Instantaneous Date Setting Feature Stop-seconds Feature for Precise Time Setting 70 Hour Power Reserve Self-winding Automatic Movement COSC Superlative Chronometer Certified Rolex Caliber 3235 Vibrations Per Hour: 28,800 6 Year Warranty Guaranteed Authentic Manufacturer Box & Manual Polished 904L Oystersteel Stainless Steel Case Brushed 904L Oystersteel Stainless Steel with Polished Solid 18k Yellow Gold Jubilee Bracelet Scratch Resistant Sapphire Crystal 100 Meters / 330 Feet Waterproof 36mm = 1 1/3" Case, 6.5" Adjustable Bracelet Fixed Bezel Screw Down Crown with Twinlock Double Waterproofness System Screw Down Case Back Folding Oysterclasp Deployment Buckle with Easylink 5mm Comfort Extension Link Free Bracelet Sizing This Rolex Datejust 36 Olive Green Dial Watch boasts a polished 904L Oystersteel stainless steel case with a brushed 904L Oystersteel stainless steel and polished solid 18k yellow gold Jubilee bracelet. The watch also features a polished solid 18k yellow gold domed fixed bezel, an olive green dial with Roman numeral hour markers and diamond Roman VI and IX, and a date window displayed under a cyclops lens at 3 o'clock with instantaneous date setting for precise timekeeping. Powered by the Rolex Caliber 3235 self-winding automatic COSC Superlative Chronometer certified movement, this watch boasts a 70 hour power reserve and beats at 28,800 vph. The scratch-resistant sapphire crystal protects the dial and the case is round with a diameter of 36mm. The screw-down crown has a Twinlock double waterproofness system and the case back is also screw-down.
